items.titolo: Jury throws out Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI after less than two hours of deliberation — Unanimous vote that Musk filed the lawsuit too late
items.descrizione: A federal jury in Oakland, California, on Monday unanimously rejected every claim in Elon Musk's lawsuit against OpenAI.

items.titolo: Tasto Copilot su Windows 11: si può tornare a Ctrl destro
items.descrizione: Dopo le proteste degli utenti, il tasto Copilot che ha sostituito Ctrl destro sulle tastiere Windows potrà essere rimappato. The post Tasto Copilot su Windows 11: si può tornare a Ctrl destro appeared first on Punto Info

items.titolo: Google I/O 2026 Live Blog: All the Gemini and Smart Glasses Updates as They Happen
items.descrizione: Follow our live coverage of Google’s annual developer keynote, where the company will announce updates to its Gemini suite of AI tools and more details about Android XR smart glasses.

items.titolo: I’m a Normie. Can Normies Really Vibe Code?
items.descrizione: Apparently anyone can vibe code anything these days. So Claude and I tried to make a database for tracking the petty grievances of the masses.
